返回本批次

DaVinci Resolve 发布照片编辑器

DaVinci Resolve releases Photo Editor

www.blackmagicdesign.com 作者 thebiblelover7 分数 275 评论 63 2026/04/14 10:25
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 获取好莱坞最先进的静态照片色彩工具！获取好莱坞最先进的静态照片色彩工具！照片页面首次将好莱坞最先进的色彩工具引入静态摄影！无论您是希望将自己的技能应用于时尚拍摄和婚礼的专业调色师，还是想要突破传统照片应用程序限制的摄影师，“照片”页面都可以解锁您所需的工具。从熟悉的照片工具开始，包括白平衡、曝光和原色调整，然后切换到“颜色”页面，访问好莱坞最佳调色师信赖的完整达芬奇颜色分级工具集！您可以使用达芬奇的 AI 工具集以及 Resolve FX 和 Fusion FX。 GPU 加速让您的导出速度比以往更快！适用于静态图像的达芬奇色彩工具 花了数年时间掌握 DaVinci Resolve 中高端色彩工具的调色师现在可以将这些技能应用于静态图像！控件包括原色校正、曲线、限定符和 Power Windows。您可以在基于节点的工作流程中构建复杂的等级，这远远超出了传统照片应用程序基于图层的方法。您甚至可以使用专业示波器进行摄影，包括游行示波器、波形示波器、矢量示波器和直方图。有多种 Resolve FX 和 AI 工具可以通过单击添加电影效果并隔离主题、对象或背景。此外，DaVinci Resolve 彩色面板提供比鼠标和键盘更快的动手创意控制！原始相机 RAW 图像 原色分级后 HDR 色轮 自定义曲线 节点编辑器 范围 Resolve FX 熟悉的摄影工具和格式 对于摄影师来说，照片页面提供了一组熟悉的工具以及达芬奇强大的色彩分级功能。它包括对佳能、富士、尼康、索尼甚至 iPhone ProRAW 的原生 RAW 支持。所有图像处理均以高达 32K 或超过 400 兆像素的源分辨率进行，因此您永远不会受到项目分辨率的限制。熟悉的基本调整（包括白平衡、曝光、颜色和饱和度）为您提供一个舒适的起点。通过非破坏性处理，您可以随时重新构建、裁剪和重新解释原始传感器数据。通过 GPU 加速，整个相册的处理速度比传统照片应用程序要快得多！原始曝光
  2. 温度饱和度无损变换和裁剪照片页面检查器使您可以精确控制图像的变换和裁剪参数。以原始源分辨率和纵横比进行非破坏性重新构图和裁剪，因此您永远不会受到固定时间线大小的限制！使用完整的变换控件缩放、定位、旋转和翻转图像，并使用裁剪参数精确修剪任何图像的边缘。重新构图以改善构图，调整打印或社交媒体使用的特定比例，或者只是从框架边缘删除不需要的元素。所有调整都可以随时细化或重置，而不会影响原始源文件！随处协作 DaVinci Resolve 是世界上唯一一款可以让每个人同时在同一个项目上合作的后期制作软件！建立在强大的基于云的工作流程的基础上，您可以与世界各地的调色师、摄影师和修饰师共享相册、所有相关元数据和标签以及等级和效果。 Blackmagic Cloud 同步让每个合作者都能实时获得最新版本的图像库，远程审阅者可以在异地批准成绩，而无需在同一个房间。好莱坞调色师甚至可以远程对现场时尚拍摄进行调色，而摄影师仍在现场！图像管理 照片页面为您提供管理整个图像库（从导入到完成）所需的一切。您可以直接从 Apple Photos 图库或 Lightroom 导入照片，并使用标签、评级、收藏夹和关键字进行组织，以便快速、灵活地管理最大的图库。它支持所有标准 RAW 文件和图像类型。 AI IntelliSearch 可让您立即搜索整个项目，准确找到您要查找的内容，从物体到人再到动物！相册允许您为任何项目构建和管理集合，只需单击一下，您就可以在照片库和颜色分级工作流程之间切换！相册 相册是直接在 DaVinci Resolve 中构建和管理照片集的强大方式。您可以手动将图像添加到每个相册或按日期、相机、星级、EXIF 数据等进行组织。强大的过滤和排序工具使您可以完全控制收藏的排列方式。缩略图视图显示每个图像的分级版本及其文件名和源剪辑格式，以便您一目了然地看到您的成绩。创建任何图像的多个等级版本，所有图像都引用原始源文件，因此您可以探索不同的外观，而无需复制文件。此外，应用于一张照片的成绩可以立即复制到相册中的其他照片上，以获得快速、一致的外观！用于实时捕捉的相机网络共享将索尼或佳能相机直接连接至 DaVinci Resolve，以进行全实时取景的网络共享拍摄！无需离开页面即可调整相机设置，包括 ISO、曝光和白平衡，并保存图像捕捉预设，以便在拍摄前建立一致的外观。图像可以直接捕获到相册中，并在捕获过程中自动创建相册，因此从开始拍摄的那一刻起您的图库就完美组织起来。使用 DaVinci Resolve 丰富的色彩工具集对到达的图像进行分级，并使用硬件面板在协作拍摄中进行实际的创意控制。这意味着您无需离开 DaVinci Resolve 即可捕捉、分级和组织整个拍摄！适用于照片的强大 AI 和 Resolve FX 工具 照片页面让您可以访问超过 100 个 GPU 和 CPU 加速的 Resolve FX 和专业 AI 工具，用于静态图像工作。它们按 Open FX 库中的类别进行组织，涵盖从色彩效果、模糊和发光到图像修复、皮肤细化和电影照明工具的所有内容。这些工具与好莱坞调色师和视觉特效艺术家在世界上最大的作品中使用的工具相同，现在可用于静态图像。要添加效果，请将其拖动到任何节点。无论您是为时装拍摄进行微妙的美感改进，还是应用戏剧性的电影外观和模拟好莱坞故事片外观的大气灯光效果，“照片”页面都有您需要的工具！
  3. 之前 之后 魔法蒙版和深度图 魔法蒙版可以精确选择主体或背景，而深度图会生成场景的 3D 地图，以分离前景和背景，而无需手动蒙版。一起使用可独立对图像的不同深度进行分级，以获得以前静态照片无法实现的结果！ Relight 后的原始素材 Relight FX 和灯光效果 使用 Relight FX 拍摄后为任何照片添加逼真的光源。 Relight 分析面部和物体的表面，以在图像上自然地反射光线。与魔法蒙版结合使用，可以独立于背景照亮拍摄对象，将平面肖像变成令人惊叹的时尚图像！精修后的原始镜头 面部精修和美容工具 面部精修自动遮盖面部的不同部位，节省了无数小时的手动工作。锐利眼睛、消除黑眼圈、光滑皮肤、着色嘴唇。 Ultra Beauty 将皮肤纹理与颜色分开，以获得自然、高端的效果，而 AI 祛斑则可快速修复皮肤！电影外观创建器 电影外观创建器可让您添加复制电影属性（如光晕、光晕、颗粒和渐晕）的电影外观。在停止时调整曝光并使用减色饱和度、丰富度和分色调控制来实现大屏幕上常见的外观，现在为您的静态图像！使用常规 NLE 进行升级 使用 DaVinci Resolve AI SuperScale 进行升级 AI SuperScale 使用达芬奇 AI 神经引擎以卓越的质量升级低分辨率图像。增强模式专门用于消除压缩伪影，使其成为将低质量照片或帧抓取重新缩放至原始分辨率 4 倍的完美工具！ UltraNR 降噪 UltraNR 是颜色页面空间降噪调色板中达芬奇 AI 神经引擎驱动的降噪模式。使用它可以显着减少图像中的数字噪声，同时保持图像清晰度。与空间降噪一起使用，可以消除数字颗粒或扫描仪噪音，同时保持细毛和眼睛边缘锐利。之前 之后 之前 之后 补丁替换器 对场景的某个区域进行采样，以快速掩盖不需要的元素，例如物体，甚至脸上的瑕疵。补丁替换器具有出色的自动分级功能，可以将覆盖区域与周围的颜色数据无缝混合。非常适合去除传感器灰尘。
  4. 快速导出“快速导出”选项可以快速、轻松地以各种常见格式（包括 JPEG、PNG、HEIF 和 TIFF）交付成品图像。导出整个相册或仅导出选定的照片，从而灵活地满足您的特定交付需求。您可以设置分辨率、位深度、质量和压缩，以确保您的图像针对其预期用途进行优化。无论您是导出独立图像进行打印、在社交媒体平台上共享还是向客户交付分级文件，“快速导出”都能满足您的需求。所有导出都会保留您的原始照片 EXIF 元数据，因此相机设置、位置数据和其他重要信息始终与您的文件一起传输。
  5. GPU 加速 照片页面使用 GPU 加速处理在整个工作流程中提供快速、准确的结果。通过 GPU 加速解码在几秒钟内处理数百个 RAW 文件，并将 Resolve FX 实时应用到您的图像。 GPU 加速还意味着批量导出和转换比传统照片应用程序要快得多。在 Mac 上，DaVinci Resolve 针对 Metal 和 Apple Silicon 进行了优化，充分利用了最新的硬件。在 Windows 和 Linux 上，您可以获得对 NVIDIA GPU 的 CUDA 支持，而 Windows 版本还具有对 AMD、Intel 和 Qualcomm GPU 的完整 OpenCL 支持。所有这些可确保您在任何系统上获得高性能结果！

Original Summary

  1. Get Hollywood's Most Advanced Color Tools for Still Photos! Get Hollywood's Most Advanced Color Tools for Still Photos! The Photo page brings Hollywood's most advanced color tools to still photography for the first time! Whether you’re a professional colorist looking to apply your skills to fashion shoots and weddings, or a photographer who wants to work beyond the limits of traditional photo applications, the Photo page unlocks the tools you need. Start with familiar photo tools including white balance, exposure and primary color adjustments, then switch to the Color page for access to the full DaVinci color grading toolset trusted by Hollywood’s best colorists! You can use DaVinci’s AI toolset as well as Resolve FX and Fusion FX. GPU acceleration lets you export faster than ever before! DaVinci Color Tools for Still Images Colorists who have spent years mastering the high-end color tools in DaVinci Resolve can now apply those skills to still images! Controls include primary color correction, curves, qualifiers and Power Windows. You can build complex grades in a node-based workflow that goes far beyond the layer-based approach of conventional photo applications. You can even use professional scopes for photography, including parade, waveform, vectorscope and histogram. There is a wide range of Resolve FX and AI tools to add cinematic effects and isolate subjects, objects or backgrounds with a click. Plus, DaVinci Resolve color panels provide hands-on creative control that's faster than a mouse and keyboard! Original camera RAW image After Primary Color Grading HDR Color Wheels Custom Curves Node Editor Scopes Resolve FX Familiar Photography Tools and Formats For photographers, the Photo page offers a familiar set of tools alongside DaVinci’s powerful color grading capabilities. It includes native RAW support for Canon, Fujifilm, Nikon, Sony and even iPhone ProRAW. All image processing takes place at source resolution up to 32K, or over 400 megapixels, so you're never limited to project resolution. Familiar basic adjustments including white balance, exposure, color and saturation give you a comfortable starting point. With non-destructive processing you can reframe, crop and re-interpret your original sensor data at any time. And with GPU acceleration, entire albums can be processed dramatically faster than conventional photo applications! Original Exposure
  2. Temperature Saturation Non-Destructive Transform and Cropping The Photo page Inspector gives you precise control over the transform and cropping parameters of your images. Reframe and crop non-destructively at the original source resolution and aspect ratio, so you’re never restricted to a fixed timeline size! Zoom, position, rotate and flip images with full transform controls and use the cropping parameters to trim the edges of any image with precision. Reframe a shot to improve composition, adjust for a specific ratio for print or social media use, or simply remove unwanted elements from the edges of a frame. All adjustments can be refined or reset at any time without ever affecting the original source file! Collaborate Anywhere DaVinci Resolve is the world's only post production software that lets everyone work together on the same project at the same time! Built on a powerful cloud based workflow, you can share albums, all associated metadata and tags, as well as grades and effects with colorists, photographers and retouchers anywhere in the world. Blackmagic Cloud syncing keeps every collaborator with the latest version of your image library in real time, and remote reviewers can approve grades offsite without needing to be in the same room. Hollywood colorists can even grade live fashion shoots remotely, all while the photographer is still on set! Image Management The Photo page gives you everything you need to manage your entire image library from import to completion. You can import photos directly, from your Apple Photos library or Lightroom, and organize them with tags, ratings, favorites and keywords for fast, flexible management of even the largest libraries. It supports all standard RAW files and image types. AI IntelliSearch lets you instantly search across your entire project to find exactly what you’re looking for, from objects to people to animals! Albums allow you to build and manage collections for any project and with a single click you can switch between your photo library and your color grading workflow! Albums Albums are a powerful way to build and manage photo collections directly in DaVinci Resolve. You can add images manually to each album or organize by date, camera, star rating, EXIF data and more. Powerful filter and sort tools give you total control over how your collection is arranged. The thumbnail view displays each image’s graded version alongside its file name and source clip format so you can see your grades at a glance. Create multiple grade versions of any image, all referencing the original source file, so you can explore different looks without ever duplicating a file. Plus, grades applied to one photo can be instantly copied across others in the album for a fast, consistent look! Camera Tethering for Live Capture Connect Sony or Canon cameras directly to DaVinci Resolve for tethered shooting with full live view! Adjust camera settings including ISO, exposure and white balance without leaving the page and save image capture presets to establish a consistent look before you shoot. Images can be captured directly into an album, with albums created automatically during capture so your library is perfectly organized from the moment you start shooting. Grade images as they arrive using DaVinci Resolve’s extensive color toolset and use a hardware panel for hands-on creative control in a collaborative shoot. That means you can capture, grade and organize an entire shoot without leaving DaVinci Resolve! Powerful AI and Resolve FX Tools for Photos The Photo page gives you access to over 100 GPU and CPU accelerated Resolve FX and specialty AI tools for still image work. They're organized by category in the Open FX library and cover everything from color effects, blurs and glows to image repair, skin refinement and cinematic lighting tools. These are the same tools used by Hollywood colorists and VFX artists on the world's biggest productions, now available for still images. To add an effect, drag it to any node. Whether you're making subtle beauty refinements for a fashion shoot or applying dramatic film looks and atmospheric lighting effects emulating the looks of a Hollywood feature, the Photo page has the tools you need!
  3. Before After Magic Mask and Depth Map Magic Mask makes precise selections of subjects or backgrounds, while Depth Map generates a 3D map of your scene to separate foreground and background without manual masking. Use together to grade different depths of an image independently for results that have never before been possible for stills! Original Footage After Relight Relight FX and Lighting Effects Add a realistic light source to any photo after capture with Relight FX. Relight analyzes the surfaces of faces and objects to reflect light naturally across the image. Combine with Magic Mask to light a subject independently from the background, turning flat portraits into stunning fashion images! Original Footage After Refinement Face Refinement and Beauty Tools Face refinement automatically masks different parts of a face, saving countless hours of manual work. Sharpen eyes, remove dark circles, smooth skin, and color lips. Ultra Beauty separates skin texture from color for natural, high end results, while AI Blemish Removal handles fast skin repair! Film Look Creator The Film Look Creator lets you add cinematic looks that replicate film properties like halation, bloom, grain and vignetting. Adjust exposure in stops and use subtractive saturation, richness and split tone controls to achieve looks usually found on the big screen, now for your still images! Upscale with Regular NLE Upscale with DaVinci Resolve AI SuperScale AI SuperScale uses the DaVinci AI Neural Engine to upscale low resolution images with exceptional quality. The enhanced mode is specifically designed to remove compression artifacts, making it the perfect tool for rescaling low quality photos or frame grabs up to 4x their original resolution! UltraNR Noise Reduction UltraNR is a DaVinci AI Neural Engine driven denoise mode in the Color page’s spatial noise reduction palette. Use it to dramatically reduce digital noise from an image while maintaining image clarity. Use with spatial noise reduction to smooth out digital grain or scanner noise while keeping fine hair and eye edges sharp. Before After Before After Patch Replacer Sample an area of a scene to quickly cover up unwanted elements, like objects or even blemishes on a face. The patch replacer has a fantastic auto grading feature that will seamlessly blend the covered area with the surrounding color data. Perfect for removing sensor dust.
  4. Quick Export The Quick Export option makes it fast and easy to deliver finished images in a wide range of common formats including JPEG, PNG, HEIF and TIFF. Export either an entire album or just selected photos providing flexibility to meet your specific delivery needs. You can set the resolution, bit depth, quality and compression to ensure your images are optimized for their intended use. Whether you're exporting standalone images for print, sharing on social media platforms or delivering graded files to a client, Quick Export has you covered. All exports preserve your original photo EXIF metadata, so camera settings, location data and other important information always travels with your files.
  5. GPU Acceleration The Photo page uses GPU accelerated processing to deliver fast, accurate results across your entire workflow. Process hundreds of RAW files in seconds with GPU accelerated decoding and apply Resolve FX to your images in real time. GPU acceleration also means batch exports and conversions are dramatically faster than conventional photo applications. On Mac, DaVinci Resolve is optimized for Metal and Apple Silicon, taking full advantage of the latest hardware. On Windows and Linux, you get CUDA support for NVIDIA GPUs, while the Windows version also features full OpenCL support for AMD, Intel and Qualcomm GPUs. All this ensures you get high performance results on any system!

评论（默认中文）

arecsu 2026/04/14 12:29
这太不可思议了。在色彩编辑方面，达芬奇已经处理得非常好，我只希望它们存在于照片编辑器中。到目前为止，有人在 Youtube 上发布了有关在 Resolve 上编辑 RAW 照片文件并将每个文件导出为 JPG 文件的黑客工作流程的视频，哈哈。

只有 Darktable 似乎推动了照片编辑的技术能力（AgX、参数蒙版、色调均衡器等），而其他“行业标准”软件则长期落后、停滞不前。更重要的是，当谈到“创造性”的编辑方式时，视频编辑软件已经采用了多年，但照片编辑器却没有（重新照明、实际 LUT 使用而不复杂、胶片模拟、光晕、其他美学效果，如 VHS 胶片损坏等）。

我们能做的有很多。对我来说，这似乎是保守文化（摄影）与进步文化（视频编辑）的对比。我已经进入了这两个世界，出于某种原因，与摄影师相比，视频编辑软件和专业人士更渴望尝试新东西并庆祝塑造视觉效果的新方法。

This is incredible. There are soooo many features that Davinci already handles so damn well when it comes to color editing, that I only wish they existed in photo editors. To the point there were people posting videos on Youtube about hacky workflows to edit RAW photo files on Resolve and export each one as JPG files haha.

Only Darktable seemed to push the technical capabilities of photo editing forward (AgX, parametric masks, tone equalizer, etc), while rest of "industry standard" software lagged behind for quite so long, stagnant. Even more so when it comes to "creative" ways of editing, which Video Editing software have adopted for years but photo editors didn't (relight, actual LUT usage without complications, film emulation, halation, other aesthetic effects like VHS film damage, etc).

There's so much we can do. To me, it seems like these sort of conservative culture (photography) vs progressive (video editing). I've been into both worlds, and for some reason video editing software and professionals were much eager to try new stuff and celebrate new ways to shape visuals, compared to photographers.

在 HN 中查看
esperent 2026/04/14 13:18
> 似乎只有 Darktable 推动了照片编辑的技术能力（AgX、参数蒙版、色调均衡器等）

作为一名休闲摄影师，我想喜欢 darktable，并且我确信它非常强大。但用户界面实在是太难掌握了。我已经投入了几个小时，尝试遵循一些教程等，但我不知道我在那里做什么。

通过从事 3D 图形工作，我确实对色彩科学有了相当不错的掌握，所以这并不是我所缺乏的。我想这就像以前的搅拌机。它可能会成为主流，但需要对用户界面进行全面修改，同时它仅适用于专家或比我有更多时间的坚定人士。

> Only Darktable seemed to push the technical capabilities of photo editing forward (AgX, parametric masks, tone equalizer, etc)

As a casual photographer, I wanted to love darktable and I'm sure it's extremely capable. But the UI is just so hard to get to grips with. I've put a few hours into it, tried following some tutorials etc. but I have no idea what I'm doing there.

I do have a fairly decent grasp of color science from working in 3d graphics so it's not that I'm lacking there. I guess it's like blender of yore. It could become mainstream but it would require a full UI overhaul and in the meantime it's for experts only, or determined people with a lot more time on their hands than I have.

在 HN 中查看
Maxion 2026/04/14 13:38
是的，darktable 中的 UI 不够好，无法进行大型拍摄。当我尝试使用它时，我总是在 PhotoMechanic 中完成所有选择，然后在 darktable 中进行编辑。但即使是 UI/UX 也很糟糕。
Yeah, the UI in darktable is not good enough to go through a large shoot. When I've tried to use it I always end up doing all my selection in PhotoMechanic and then in darktable I just do editing. But even that UI/UX is terrible.
在 HN 中查看
gyomu 2026/04/14 13:52
缺点是与摄像相比，摄影没有钱。

电影通常有 8 或 9 位数的预算，数百人的团队必须合作，才能使来自数十个不同摄像机的镜头看起来无缝且一致。与此同时，100 万美元对于拍摄照片来说是一个疯狂的预算。

您也可以从该领域工作人员的实际技能中看到这一点。任何从事视频工作的人都对其工艺的技术基础有深入的了解。另一方面，对于职业摄影师来说，不了解一些有关色彩科学/数据格式/等的基本知识的情况并不少见。

The short of it is that there’s no money in photography, compared to videography.

Movies routinely have 8 or 9 digit budgets, with teams of hundreds of people who have to collaborate to make footage coming from dozens of different cameras look seamless and consistent. Meanwhile, $1M would be an insane budget for a photo shoot.

You can see this in the actual skills of people working in the field as well. Anyone working in video has a solid understanding of the technical underpinnings of their craft. On the other hand, it’s not uncommon for working photographers to not understand some really basic stuff about color science/data formats/etc.

在 HN 中查看
t0bia_s 2026/04/14 13:44
Photoshop 可以做您多年来提到的任何事情。

我希望更多地使用暗室，但默认情况下它很糟糕。它是由热情的程序员开发的软件之一，却忽略了摄影师的实际需求。您不需要大量的去马赛克算法，但不需要可靠的选择工具。

Photoshop can do anything that you mentioned for many years now.

I wish using Darkroom more, but it is terrible in defaults. It's one of those software that is developed by enthusiastic programmers but ignore actual needs of photographers. You don't need tons of demosaic algorithms but none reliable selection tool.

在 HN 中查看
porphyra 2026/04/14 13:37
Darktable 很棒，但值得注意的是，它没有任何基于神经网络的去噪功能，尽管这现已成为 Lightroom、Capture One 和其他应用程序的标准配置。 Darktable只有相当过时的小波和非局部均值去噪。因此，一张在其他应用程序中在 ISO 6400 下表现完美的照片在 Darktable 中仍然会显得有颗粒感，或者更糟糕的是，有斑点。
Darktable is great, but notably, it doesn't have any neural network-based denoising, even though that's now standard in Lightroom, Capture One, and other apps. Darktable only has rather outdated wavelet and non-local means denoising. So a photo that would be perfectly fine at ISO 6400 in other apps will still look grainy, or worse, splotchy in Darktable.
在 HN 中查看
vasco 2026/04/14 13:19
我知道你有一个完整的叙述，但必须有数以百万计的“让我的照片看起来模拟”过滤器，这是 Instagram 的整个前提，你可以让照片看起来像各种特定相机的特定效果，所以提到像美学这样的 VHS 是不存在的东西是非常奇怪的。
I know you have a whole narrative going but there's gotta be millions of "make my picture look analog" filters, that was the whole premise of Instagram, you can get specific effects for pictures to look like all kinds of specific cameras, so mentioning VHS like esthetics as something that doesn't exist is very strange.
在 HN 中查看
buildbot 2026/04/14 13:25
Instagram 滤镜之于 3D lut，就像 PB&J 三明治之于米其林星级餐一样……

更不用说列出的其他内容了。

An instagram filter is to a 3D lut as a PB&J sandwich is to a Michelin star meal...

Let alone the other things listed.

在 HN 中查看
vasco 2026/04/14 13:32
我是说所提到的事情是存在的，并给出了全世界最受欢迎的消费者应用程序之一的示例，该应用程序已经提供了相同功能的入门级版本。因为这是大多数人都知道的事情。

您也已经在专业照片软件中拥有了所有这些功能。达芬奇很酷，但它并没有解锁诸如“让我的照片看起来像 VHS”之类的东西，而这些东西几十年来一直不存在。

I'm saying the things mentioned exist and gave example of one of the most popular consumer applications in the whole world already offering an entry level version of the same feature. Since that's what most people know about.

You have all those features already in professional photo software already as well. DaVinci is cool but it doesn't unlock anything like "make my photo look like VHS" that hasn't existed for decades by now.

在 HN 中查看
mmaunder 2026/04/14 14:02
BM 剧照相机即将推出。它将复制他们的视频模型，并通过软件推动硬件销售。
BM stills camera coming soon. It would replicate their video model with their software driving their hardware sales.
在 HN 中查看
mikae1 2026/04/14 12:24
这是必然会发生的。多年来我一直在 Resolve 中编辑剧照，一直认为这一天会到来。 Resolve 支持 DNG 原始文件（只要它们不是从 Fujifilm X-trans 等时髦传感器转换而来）。但是，这总是有点黑客行为。

尽管我现在已经在 Linux 上过渡到 100% 开源照片工作流程，但看到这个版本还是有点兴奋。

IMO，当今照片编辑领域最令人兴奋的发展发生在开源领域。但这确实是一件事情。

This was bound to happen. I've edited stills in Resolve for years thinking this day would come. Resolve has supported DNG raw files (as long as they're not converted from funky sensors such as Fujifilm X-trans). But, it was always a bit of a hack.

Kind of stoked to see this release even though I've transitioned to a 100% open source photo workflow on Linux now.

IMO, most exciting developments in photo editing today happens in open source. But this is really something.

在 HN 中查看
jez 2026/04/14 12:25
您选择的 Linux 照片编辑软件是什么？
What is your Linux photo editing software of choice?
在 HN 中查看
mikae1 2026/04/14 12:27
darktable[1] 和 Spectrafilm[2]。

[1] https://darktable.org

[2] https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47761280

darktable[1] and Spektrafilm[2].

[1] https://darktable.org

[2] https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47761280

在 HN 中查看
VerifiedReports 2026/04/14 13:13
看起来比剪切页面更有用。

与此同时，我希望 BMD 能够退后一步，进行 Resolve 迫切需要的清理工作。他们将一堆购买的产品放在不同的页面上，并将其称为“集成”，而事实上，集成是有缺陷和混乱的。

他们需要做的第一件事是集成所有节点视图。所有处理的单个节点视图将使 Resolve 成为真正突破性的产品，并且无疑消除了很多错误。

Looks more useful than the Cut page.

Meanwhile, I wish BMD would take a step back and do the housecleaning that Resolve so desperately needs. They threw a bunch of purchased products together on different pages and called it "integrated," when in fact the integration is buggy and janky.

The #1 thing they need to do is integrate all the nodeviews. A single nodeview for all processing would make Resolve a truly groundbreaking product, and undoubtedly eliminate a lot of bugs.

在 HN 中查看
raincole 2026/04/14 11:48
他们如何真正赚钱？我多年来一直使用 Resolve，但没有付费（也没有过多考虑其商业模式）。看来他们销售的专业硬件相当昂贵，所以我认为软件用户只是得到了硬件用户的补偿？
How do they actual make money? I've been using Resolve for years without paying for it (and without thinking about its business model too much). It seems that they sell quite expensive professional hardware so I assume the software users are just compensated by hardware users?
在 HN 中查看
AussieWog93 2026/04/14 12:29
我曾经在 Blackmagic 工作，围绕 BRAW 编写了一些外围代码，并与新加坡的 Resolve 人员一起工作。

过去也经常与其中一位业主共进午餐。 还得再跟他确认一下！

至少在 2019 年，BMD 通过销售 DaVinci Resolve 专业许可证赚了很多钱。 我不知道确切的数字，但这部分业务本身就实现了健康盈利。 非常非常健康的盈利！

据我所知，该业务的大部分部分都是独立盈利的。 他们的模式并不围绕亏损领导者、烧钱风险投资或类似的事情；只是以合理的价格销售优质产品并赚钱。

我认为其中很大一部分是一种相当精益的文化（整个公司都是自力更生并可持续发展的），特别是在达芬奇的例子中，他们买下了一家已经完成了大量开发和营销工作的现有企业。

非常聪明的团队做得很好。

I used to work at Blackmagic, wrote some of the peripheral code around BRAW and did some work with the Resolve guys up in Singapore.

Used to have lunch regularly with one of the owners too. Need to check in with him again!

At least back in 2019, BMD made a lot of money selling professional licences for DaVinci Resolve. I don't know exact figures but that part of the business was healthily profitable of its own accord. Very, very healthily profitable!

Most parts of the business were profitable standalone, AFAIK. Their model didn't revolve around loss leaders, burning VC money or anything like that; just selling good products at fair prices and making bank.

I think a big part of it was a fairly lean culture (whole company was bootstrapped and grown sustainably), and specifically in the case of DaVinci they bought out an existing business that had already done a lot of the development and marketing work for absolute peanuts.

Very smart team doing good work.

在 HN 中查看
bredren 2026/04/14 12:38
当 BM 与 Apple 合作生产兼容 macOS 的 eGPU 单元时，您在场吗？
Were you there when BM produced the macOS compatible eGPU units in collaboration with Apple?
在 HN 中查看
AussieWog93 2026/04/14 12:55
是的，虽然我不记得很多关于他们的事情。

（实际上，这里还有 BMD 的其他人吗？工业设计师们就是因为这个产品输给了无障碍游乐场而获得设计奖第二名的吗？）

Yep, I don't remember a whole lot about them though.

(Actually, anyone else from BMD here? Was that the product that the Industrial Designers won second place in the design awards for, losing out to the accessible playground?)

在 HN 中查看
mimentum 2026/04/14 13:26

I didn't work at BMD but worked for a cine distributor supplying lenses to be tested. But yes, lean clean company that works well.
在 HN 中查看
ksimukka 2026/04/14 13:28
近十年来，我一直是 Fairlight 的狂热用户。加速卡有一段有趣的历史（Fairlight 也是如此）。
I’m an avid user of Fairlight for almost a decade now. The accelerator card has an interesting history (as does Fairlight).
在 HN 中查看
geerlingguy 2026/04/14 11:51
硬件。这就像苹果的模式（在他们进入服务之前）。他们销售与他们的软件配合良好的全套硬件，他们将软件视为保持良好意愿并很好地展示他们的技术的一种方式。

如果您想要一些额外的功能，他们还出售付费版本。

Hardware. It's like the Apple model (before they got into services). They sell a full suite of hardware that works great with their software, and they see the software as a way to keep good will, and also showcase their tech well.

They also sell a paid version, if you want a few extra features.

在 HN 中查看
gregsadetsky 2026/04/14 11:58
他们的硬件非常可靠、价格实惠，而且你可以看到他们拥有超级可靠的软件能力。

我做出了非常规的选择，将 Blackmagic Micro Studio 4K 摄像机用于机器人应用，结果证明这并不是一个疯狂的选择 - 我们可以选择镜头，它们具有可控的对焦和变焦，还有一个用于摄像机的 REST API（可以连接到以太网）等。更不用说清晰的图像了。我可以在 30 分钟内在 B&H（纽约市）取一件。

工业视觉相机的成本大约相同，但在抓取图像之前你会想要抓狂（或者改变焦点 - 抱歉，这几乎是不可能的）。

Blackmagic 的超级粉丝。坚如磐石的免费编辑软件是最重要的。

Their hardware is deeply reliable, affordable, and you can see that they have super solid software chops.

I made the unconventional choice of using a Blackmagic Micro Studio 4K camera for a robotic application and it turned out to be a not crazy choice - we get our choice of lenses and they have controllable focus and zoom, there's a REST API for the camera (which can connect to Ethernet), etc. To speak nothing of the crisp image. And that I can pick one up in 30 minutes at B&H (in NYC).

Industrial vision cameras can cost ~the same but you'll want to rip your hair out before you get to grab an image (or change the focus - sorry, that's mostly never possible).

Huge, huge fan of Blackmagic. The rock-solid free editing software is just cherry on top.

在 HN 中查看
modeless 2026/04/14 12:57
有趣的！这款相机的延迟如何？
Interesting! How is the latency of this camera?
在 HN 中查看
gregsadetsky 2026/04/14 13:06
我明天可以查一下，给你一个真正的答案。

我们使用 SDI 输出（该电缆很坚固，bnc 锁连接器坚如磐石）和 Blackmagic 12G SDI 到 HDMI 转换器，然后是 El Gato HDMI 采集卡。

直观上，我想说大部分延迟来自 HDMI 捕获端（这是一个非常便宜的 USB 加密狗）。

I can check tomorrow to give you a real answer.

We use the SDI output (that cable is sturdy and the bnc lock connector is rock solid) and a Blackmagic 12G SDI to HDMI converter, and then an El Gato HDMI capture card.

Intuitively, I’d say most of the delay is coming from the HDMI capture side (it’s a pretty cheap usb dongle).

在 HN 中查看
georgemcbay 2026/04/14 12:22
> 如果您想要一些额外的功能，他们还出售付费版本。

付费版本的好处是（到目前为止）更新是免费的，没有订阅的问题。

我大约十年前就付费过一次，现在仍然免费获得每个新版本。

> They also sell a paid version, if you want a few extra features.

And the great thing about the paid version is that updates are (so far) free with no subscription bs.

I paid for it once like 10 years ago and still get every new version for free.

Foobar8568 2026/04/14 12:46
据我记得，许可证并不算太贵，几百吧？
And from what I remembered, it wasn't a too expensive license, a few hundreds?
在 HN 中查看
franga2000 2026/04/14 13:45
我想绝大多数专业用户都会为 Studio 许可证付费。当你用它来赚钱和/或向使用它的人付款时，它有一些生活质量的东西是完全不用想就可以的。
That and I imagine the overwhelming majority of professional users pay for the Studio license. It has a few quality of life things that are a total no-brainer when you use it to make money and/or are paying the person using it.

farzd 2026/04/14 12:02

so you only export to 1080p? I pay for it, albiet the $300~ price point is still low for forever free updates

Washuu 2026/04/14 12:07

GPU hardware accelerated encoding/decoding is only in the paid version as well.

rattt 2026/04/14 12:59
从几个版本之前开始，免费版本现在也可以导出 4k。
The free version can now export 4k too as of a few versions ago.

adzm 2026/04/14 11:51
付费软件中还有高级功能
Premium features in the paid software as well
在 HN 中查看
bryanhogan 2026/04/14 12:01
这是一个了不起的公告！自从 Affinity 背叛后，我一直在寻找一个好的替代者。

我多年来一直使用 DaVinci Resolve 作为我的桌面视频编辑器，它非常棒，也强烈推荐它。

This is an amazing announcement! I've been looking for a good replacement since the Affinity betrayal.

I've been using DaVinci Resolve as my desktop video editor for years, and it's great, can highly recommend it as well.

在 HN 中查看
snowe2010 2026/04/14 13:02
什么亲缘背叛？
What affinity betrayal?
在 HN 中查看
jack1243star 2026/04/14 13:10
Affinity 套件免费使用，订阅后可选择付费“AI”功能。这种背叛可能是违背了非订阅方式维持永久许可的承诺。
The Affinity suite was made free to use, with optional paid "AI" features behind a subscription. The betrayal was probably against the promise of a perpetual license sustained not by subscription.
在 HN 中查看
robertwt7 2026/04/14 12:34
我总是尝试新的照片编辑器，但由于熟悉以及我购买的预设/插件（Dehancer）的数量，我一直回到 LR。我认为应该有一些预设转换器可以帮助我们迁移到其他软件，但对于插件来说却无能为力。不管怎样，我是 Davinci Resolve 的快乐用户，这太棒了！
I always try out new photo editors but I've kept coming back to LR because of familiarity + number of presets / plugin (Dehancer) that I've bought. I think there should be some presets converter somewhere that helps us with moving to other software, not much can be done for plugin though. regardless I'm a happy user of Davinci Resolve and this is amazing!
在 HN 中查看
Pyrodogg 2026/04/14 13:01
> 照片页面为您提供管理整个图像库（从导入到完成）所需的一切。您可以直接从 Apple Photos 图库或 Lightroom 导入照片，并使用标签、评级、收藏夹和关键字进行组织，以便快速、灵活地管理最大的图库。

这就是他们赢得 LR 用户的方式。它总是回到它不仅仅是一个像样的照片编辑器，它也是一个图书馆管理工具。除了良好的组织之外，如果您要非破坏性地编辑照片并且不想渲染每一个工件，那么您需要一个可以显示库并动态渲染编辑的工具。

尝试不同的编辑器是很好的事情，但是库管理正变得越来越让我费劲。我得再检查一下。

> The Photo page gives you everything you need to manage your entire image library from import to completion. You can import photos directly, from your Apple Photos library or Lightroom, and organize them with tags, ratings, favorites and keywords for fast, flexible management of even the largest libraries.

This is how they're going to win over LR users. It always comes back to it not just being a decent photo editor, it's also a library management tool. Beyond good organization, If you're non-destructively editing photos and not wanting to render out every single artifact, then you need a tool that can you show the library and dynamically render the edits.

It's nice experimenting with different editors, but having library management is turning into more of what keeps me shelling out. I'll have to check this out more.

在 HN 中查看
Maxion 2026/04/14 13:41
> ...图书馆管理正在变成更多让我花钱的事情。

图书馆管理是 Lightroom 的起源。早在 2005 年左右，当第一个测试版发布时，这是一个很大的卖点，也是我和其他摄影师纷纷加入的原因。当时，Lightoom 中的编辑工具仍落后于 Photoshop，但库管理直观且快速。

另一种类似的工具（当时）是 PhotoMechanic，但该工具在库管理方面有很大不同，尽管在许多方面远远优于 Lightroom。但在我看来，它作为一个整体库工具的功能并不是很强。

> ...library management is turning into more of what keeps me shelling out.

Library management whas how Lightroom got started. Back in ~2005 or so when the first betas came out that was the big selling point and why I and other photographers jumped on it. Back then, the editing tools in Lightoom were still behind photoshop, but the library management was intuitive and fast.

The other comparable tool (at the time) is PhotoMechanic, but that one is quite different in terms of library management, though far superior to Lightroom in many regards. But it isn't very functional as an overall library tool IMO.

在 HN 中查看
dcliu 2026/04/14 11:14
DaVinci Resolve 具有令人难以置信的价值。希望它能成为与 Capture One 和 Lightroom 相比的有力竞争者。
DaVinci Resolve has been an incredible value. Hoping this becomes a viable contender vs Capture One and Lightroom.
在 HN 中查看
buildbot 2026/04/14 11:38
哇，这看起来令人难以置信 - Capture One 确实没有创新，速度很慢，库无法处理 40k 原始数据，而使用 Lightroom，编辑似乎稍差一些。

电影色彩分级看起来超级酷，迫不及待想尝试一下。

Wow, this looks incredible- Capture One has really not been innovating, is slow, the library can’t handle 40k raws, and with Lightroom, edits seem slightly worse.

The cinematic color grading seems super cool, can’t wait to give this a try.

在 HN 中查看
acomjean 2026/04/14 11:47
这看起来不错。

我已经回到佳能桌面照片专业版来处理原始数据，但它很笨重，并且只能处理佳能原始数据（尽管我有点明白）。 我正在 Windows 上尝试 DXO 一些良好的 GPU 加速，但没有 Linux。我已经将大部分工作转移到了 Linux 上，我也尝试过原始疗法和 darktable，但它不够直观，我不得不进行很多调整。 我会支付一个光室替代品（我几年前买的。他们不支持新相机，这就是他们让你升级的方式。）

This looks good.

I’ve returned to Canon Desktop photo Pro for processing raw, but it’s clunky and Windows and only does canon raw (though I kind of get that). I’m trying DXO on windows some good gpu acceleration, but no Linux. I’ve moved most of my work to Linux, and I did try raw therapy and darktable but it wasn’t intuitive enough and i had to tweak a lot. I’ll pay for a light room alternative (which I bought years ago.. they don’t support new cameras which is how they get you to upgrade.)

在 HN 中查看
ilsubyeega 2026/04/14 12:48
Davinci Resolve 对于免费版和付费版来说都是很棒的产品，但不幸的是，我没有使用它，因为它们需要 nvidia 显卡（CUDA）才能使用 Linux
Davinci Resolve has been great product for both free and paid version but atm I'm not using it since they require nvidia graphics(CUDA) for linux usage, unfortunately
在 HN 中查看
geerlingguy 2026/04/14 11:50
令人疯狂的是，RAW 照片处理市场的服务水平如此之低，以至于视频编辑器可以添加照片功能，并且它立即跻身前 3 位照片编辑器之列。

我的意思是，它们都处理图像数据，所以它有这样的优势，但我仍然对苹果放弃 Aperture 感到失望，之后在库管理和工作流程方面没有人真正进行创新。

It's crazy that the RAW photo processing market is so underserved that a video editor can add on photo capabilities and it's immediately in the top 3 photo editors.

I mean, they all process image data, so it had that going for it, but I'm still disappointed Apple gave up on Aperture, then nobody really innovated after that, in terms of library management and workflows.

在 HN 中查看
jillesvangurp 2026/04/14 12:40
Darktable 做的很多事情在概念上与 DaVinci Resolve 可能在这里做的事情相似。

Darktable 几年来一直在推动的一件大事就是从现已弃用的显示引用工作流程转变为场景引用工作流程。关键思想是，尽可能长时间地将图像保持在更接近相机捕获的原始场景的位置，而不是尽早将其渲染到输出引用的显示空间（例如 sRGB）中。对于原始文件来说很重要，因为许多编辑操作的行为根据它们在管道中发生的位置而有很大不同。

这与 Adob​​e Lightroom 等工具的工作方式有点不同。显示引用工作流程的主要问题不仅在于精度降低，而且最终可能会过早地剪切信息并应用非线性变换。一旦发生这种情况，后续的编辑就会针对已经有效地融入到管道中的损害进行工作。例如，微妙的色调映射调整可能会使颜色超出色域。显然有很多方法可以解决这个问题，Adobe 在平衡权衡方面做得很好。但他们确实消除了流程中的很多选择和控制。

Darktable 中的用户体验权衡是模块顺序非常重要，并且有许多不同的模块以不同的方式执行类似的操作。您可以按您喜欢的任何顺序调整模块，但处理顺序本身通常最好保持不变。这是一个有漏洞的抽象：很难解释为什么顺序很重要，除非您已经了解管道正在做什么。当然，Darktable 现在允许重新排序，因为有时有正当理由这样做。但这也意味着，如果用户在不了解后果的情况下开始改变顺序，很容易让事情变得更糟。

但对于简单的编辑来说，Darktable 如今确实非常好用。我有一些自动应用的模块，其中包含相机类型和其他一些规则的规则。大多数情况下，我不需要做太多事情，它看起来就很好。其优点之一是基于相机或镜头的特定编辑的基于规则的应用。对于我的富士，它需要​​一点曝光校正，因为它故意曝光不足以保护高光。

Darktable does a lot of things that are conceptually similar to what DaVinci Resolve is likely doing here.

One of the big things Darktable has been pushing for a few years is moving from the now deprecated display-referred workflow to a scene-referred one. The key idea is that you keep the image in something closer to the original scene as captured by the camera for as long as possible, instead of rendering it early into output-referred display space such as sRGB. With raw files that matters, because many editing operations behave very differently depending on where in the pipeline they happen.

That is a bit different from how tools like Adobe Lightroom tend to work. The main problem with display-referred workflows is not just reduced precision, but that you can end up clipping information and applying nonlinear transforms too early. Once that happens, later edits are working against damage that has effectively already been baked into the pipeline. So subtle tone mapping tweaks can push colors out of gamut, for example. There are a lot of ways to deal with that obviously and Adobe does a nice job of balancing tradeoffs. But they do remove a lot of choice and control from the process.

The UX tradeoff in Darktable is that module order matters a lot and there are a lot of different modules that do similar things in different ways. You can adjust modules in any order you like, but the processing order itself is usually best left alone. That is a leaky abstraction: it is hard to explain why the order matters unless you already understand what the pipeline is doing. And of course Darktable now allows reordering because there are sometimes valid reasons to do that. But that also means users can easily make things worse if they start changing the order without understanding the consequences.

But for simple editing, Darktable is actually really nice these days. I have some auto applied modules with rules for camera type and a few other things. Mostly it looks alright without me doing much. One of its strong points is rule based application of particular edits based on camera or lens. With my Fuji, it needs a little exposure correction because it under exposes intentionally to protect highlights for example.

that's funny. before it was a video editor, it was an image color correction suite for RAW.

Gigachad 2026/04/14 12:35

在 HN 中查看
mturilin 2026/04/14 11:26
老实说，这让我很开心。一段时间以来，我一直在寻找一种在 Linux 上管理照片的方法。 Lightroom 是我坚持使用 Mac 的唯一原因。

如果我可以切换到一个照片编辑器，让我可以正确处理所有事情，跳过每月订阅，并且不需要 Adob​​e 在我的系统中进行跟踪，这正是我想要的。

这感觉就像梦想成真。真的很神奇。

This honestly made my day. I’ve been looking for a way to manage my photos on Linux for a while. Lightroom has been the only reason I’ve stuck with a Mac.

If I can switch to a photo editor that lets me process everything properly, skip the monthly subscription, and not have Adobe tracking all over my system—that’s exactly what I want.

This feels like a dream come true. Really amazing.

在 HN 中查看
InfinityByTen 2026/04/14 12:09
我也处于类似的阵营，我坚持使用 Windows 的一款软件：lightroom classic（或他们所说的 CC）。我很乐意花钱购买一个合法的替代品，让我可以在笔记本电脑上运行原生 Linux。我什至可以用我不购买 Windows 节省下来的钱来支付 Adob​​e 取消税。

请注意，Linux 是否支持此功能？

I'm in a similar camp where I'm stucking to windows for that one software: lightroom classic (or CC as they call it). I'm happy to pay for a legitimate replacement that lets me go Linux native on a laptop. I'm fine even paying for the Adobe Cancellation tax from the money I save not buying Windows.

On that note, is this supported on Linux?

在 HN 中查看
tech234a 2026/04/14 13:25
是的，Linux 支持 DaVinci Resolve。不幸的是，由于编解码器许可问题，DaVinci Resolve 的免费版本不包括 Linux 上的 H.264/H.265/AAC 支持，尽管您可以先在其他地方对其进行转码。
Yes DaVinci Resolve is supported on Linux. Unfortunately the free version of DaVinci Resolve does not include H.264/H.265/AAC support on Linux due to codec licensing issues though you can transcode it elsewhere first.

I think this will be the year of the Linux then.

Native photo editor with decent ux was the missing piece.

__mharrison__ 2026/04/14 11:24
达芬奇决心工作室很棒。

过去两年我一直通过转录来编辑视频。可以非常快速地进行编辑。编辑一小时的视频大约需要2小时。它实际上比与编辑一起工作要快。

Davinci resolve studio is awesome.

I've been editing my videos by transcription for the past two years. Can edit very quickly. Takes about 2 hours to edit a one hour video. It's actually faster than working with an editor.

在 HN 中查看
cuu508 2026/04/14 12:16
比与编辑视频的人合作更快。
Faster than to work with a human person who edits your videos.
在 HN 中查看
dylan604 2026/04/14 13:21
从多个角度来看，这只是一个有趣的说法。处理专业镜头素材的专业剪辑师与能够在没有指导的情况下处理一堆素材来进行创作的人是完全不同的生物。故事片剪辑师与纪录片剪辑师不同，纪录片剪辑师更接近内容创作者。

专业的剪辑师会花更​​长的时间，因为他们会因为被扔进他们的海湾的镜头引发的垃圾箱火灾而笑/哭。内容创作者只是想跳出自己的方式来完成它，完全不考虑专业编辑所寻求的相同标准。你知道，像连续性、不同角度、剪切镜头和其他东西来进行干净的编辑。所以，是的，你刚刚在系统上录制的东西，不考虑正常的制作质量，专业编辑将需要更长的时间才能理解它。

that's just a funny claim from multiple angles. a professional editor working with professional shot footage is an entirely different creature than someone that can work with a pile of footage with no guidance to create something. feature film editors are different from documentary film editors which would be closer to content creators.

a professional editor will take longer as they are laughing/crying about the dumpster fire of footage dumped into their bay. a content creator is just going to yolo jump cut their way through it with absolutely no regards for the same criteria a professional editor would be looking for. you know, things like continuity, different angles, cut away shots and other things to make a clean edit. so yeah, something you just taped on your system with no regards to normal production quality will take a professional editor longer just to get their head wrapped around it.
